name: Quiche Lorraine Ala Katherine
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauté onion until tender.
2. Place bacon, onion, and cheeses in pie shell.
3. Blend together eggs, half-and-half, salt, and pepper.
4. Pour mixture over the ingredients in the quiche shell.
5. Bake at 375°F for 45 minutes, or until firm and light brown.
